response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior IC with broad full-stack and tooling experience, but the role requires a Level II Engineering Manager with 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership specifically in developer tools/build/test infrastructure. The resume shows no formal people-management experience, no direct reports, and limited evidence of building compilers, build systems, or test automation at scale. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also absent. Mismatch on the core management requirement makes this a no for the EM role, though they could be a strong senior IC candidate elsewhere.
strengths: 10+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded with strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Some developer-tooling exposure: MCP code generators, test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/GitLab/Docker infra at Altom
Demonstrated teaching/leadership through workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos — signals mentoring aptitude
concerns: No people-management experience — no evidence of direct reports, 1:1s, performance reviews, or hiring
Limited match to core domain: no compiler work, no large-scale build systems, no mobile-platform ecosystem experience
Title trajectory is IC (Senior/Staff Engineer), not management; no organizational change leadership shown

key_factors.factor: No mobile-platform or build-system domain match
Strong IC craftsmanship and dev-tooling side projects
